name: The Bengal Scam: Bima Kando
overview: Two insurance agents stumble upon several mysterious cases of people with life insurance policies from their company dying accidental deaths. The duo starts an investigation to find the truth, but they are clueless about the menacing mastermind behind the whole thing.

trailers.title: Trailer -The Bengal Scam: Bima Kando | Rajatava, Sonamoni, Kinjal | Abhirup | 11th Nov | hoichoi
